ot_description: Added the weekly filter to the birthday screen and fixed the react-native-svg version that was breaking npm ci. Carried on the profile screen redesign and its API fixes, switched profile photos to an authenticated fetch, and made the API base URL environment-driven for the production web build.

tasks.name: Weekly Birthday Filter — feat & fix
tasks.body: Weekly birthday filter feature and react-native-svg fix
tasks.summary:
- Added Weekly filter to birthday screen using react-native-ui-datepicker pickers
- Fixed react-native-svg to v15.15.5 to resolve npm ci lock file mismatch
- Merged fix/weekly-birthday-dropdown into dev (PRs #129 & #130)

tasks.name: Profile Screen Redesign
tasks.body: Profile screen redesign and API fix
tasks.summary:
- Refined ProfileScreen redesign: edit table, fields, and card layout
- Fixed API integration issues on profile screen
- Merged origin/dev into feature branch and merged PR #124 into dev

tasks.name: Auth-Protected Profile Photos
tasks.summary: - Rendered auth-protected profile photos via authenticated fetch instead of direct URL access

tasks.name: Environment-Driven API Base URL & Production Web Build
tasks.body: API base URL config and production web build
tasks.summary:
- Made API base URL environment-driven via env config
- Added production web build configuration

ot_pushed.summary: Added the weekly filter to the birthday screen and fixed the react-native-svg version that was breaking npm ci. Carried on the profile screen redesign and its API fixes, switched profile photos to an authenticated fetch, and made the API base URL environment-driven for the production web build.
